overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l l} g = (a + b + d + f) (b + c + d) \cdot & \text { Absorption   Law } \\ (d + e + f) (a + e + f) & \\ = [ (a + f) c + (b + d) ] [ d a + (e + f) ] & \text { Distributive   Law   of   +   over   \cdot, } \\ & \text { and   the   Commutative   Law   of   + } \end{array}

overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l} \frac {1}{(x - 3) (x - 2) ^ {2}} = \frac {1}{x - 3} - \frac {1}{x - 2} - \frac {1}{(x - 2) ^ {2}} \\ \qquad = \left(\frac {- 1}{3}\right) \frac {1}{1 - (x / 3)} + \left(\frac {1}{2}\right) \frac {1}{1 - (x / 2)} + \left(\frac {- 1}{4}\right) \frac {1}{(1 - (x / 2)) ^ {2}} \\ \qquad = \left(\frac {- 1}{3}\right) \sum_ {i = 0} ^ {\infty} \left(\frac {x}{3}\right) ^ {i} + \left(\frac {1}{2}\right) \sum_ {i = 0} ^ {\infty} \left(\frac {x}{2}\right) ^ {i} \\ \qquad + \left(\frac {- 1}{4}\right) \left[ \binom {- 2} {0} + \binom {- 2} {1} \left(\frac {- x}{2}\right) + \binom {- 2} {2} \left(\frac {- x}{2}\right) ^ {2} + \dots \right]. \\ \text {The coefficient of x^8 is (-1 / 3)(1 / 3)^8 + (1 / 2)(1 / 2)^8 + (-1 / 4)\binom{-2}{8})(-1 / 2)^8 =} \\ - [ (1 / 3) ^ {9} + 7 (1 / 2) ^ {1 0} ]. \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{l} \frac {1}{(x - 3) (x - 2) ^ {2}} = \frac {1}{x - 3} - \frac {1}{x - 2} - \frac {1}{(x - 2) ^ {2}} \\ \qquad = \left(\frac {- 1}{3}\right) \frac {1}{1 - (x / 3)} + \left(\frac {1}{2}\right) \frac {1}{1 - (x / 2)} + \left(\frac {- 1}{4}\right) \frac {1}{(1 - (x / 2)) ^ {2}} \\ \qquad = \left(\frac {- 1}{3}\right) \sum_ {i = 0} ^ {\infty} \left(\frac {x}{3}\right) ^ {i} + \left(\frac {1}{2}\right) \sum_ {i = 0} ^ {\infty} \left(\frac {x}{2}\right) ^ {i} \\ \qquad + \left(\frac {- 1}{4}\right) \left[ \binom {- 2} {0} + \binom {- 2} {1} \left(\frac {- x}{2}\right) + \binom {- 2} {2} \left(\frac {- x}{2}\right) ^ {2} + \dots \right]. \\ \text {The coefficient of } x^8 \text { is } (-1 / 3)(1 / 3)^8 + (1 / 2)(1 / 2)^8 + (-1 / 4)\binom{-2}{8})(-1 / 2)^8 = \\ - [ (1 / 3) ^ {9} + 7 (1 / 2) ^ {1 0} ]. \end{array}

overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l} f (x) = \left(1 + x + \frac {x ^ {2}}{2 !} + \dots\right) \left(1 + \frac {x ^ {2}}{2 !} + \frac {x ^ {4}}{4 !} + \dots\right) \left(1 + x + \frac {x ^ {2}}{2 !} + \dots\right) \left(1 + x + \frac {x ^ {2}}{2 !} + \dots\right) \\ = e ^ {x} \cdot \left(\frac {e ^ {x} + e ^ {- x}}{2}\right) \cdot e ^ {x} \cdot e ^ {x} \\ = \left(\frac {1}{2}\right) e ^ {4 x} + \left(\frac {1}{2}\right) e ^ {2 x} \\ = \left(\frac {1}{2}\right) \sum_ {n = 0} ^ {\infty} \frac {(4 x) ^ {n}}{n !} + \left(\frac {1}{2}\right) \sum_ {n = 0} ^ {\infty} \frac {(2 x) ^ {n}}{n !}. \\ \text {Here a_{n} = the coefficient of \frac{x^{n}}{n!} in f(x) = (\frac {1}{2}) 4^{n} + (\frac {1}{2}) 2^{n} = 2^{n - 1} + 2(4^{n - 1}), as above.} \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{l} f (x) = \left(1 + x + \frac {x ^ {2}}{2 !} + \dots\right) \left(1 + \frac {x ^ {2}}{2 !} + \frac {x ^ {4}}{4 !} + \dots\right) \left(1 + x + \frac {x ^ {2}}{2 !} + \dots\right) \left(1 + x + \frac {x ^ {2}}{2 !} + \dots\right) \\ = e ^ {x} \cdot \left(\frac {e ^ {x} + e ^ {- x}}{2}\right) \cdot e ^ {x} \cdot e ^ {x} \\ = \left(\frac {1}{2}\right) e ^ {4 x} + \left(\frac {1}{2}\right) e ^ {2 x} \\ = \left(\frac {1}{2}\right) \sum_ {n = 0} ^ {\infty} \frac {(4 x) ^ {n}}{n !} + \left(\frac {1}{2}\right) \sum_ {n = 0} ^ {\infty} \frac {(2 x) ^ {n}}{n !}. \\ \text {Here } a_{n} = \text { the coefficient of } \frac{x^{n}}{n!} \text { in } f(x) = (\frac {1}{2}) 4^{n} + (\frac {1}{2}) 2^{n} = 2^{n - 1} + 2(4^{n - 1}) \text {, as above.} \end{array}
